notes: On initial run installs regular things along with Uplay, but then (and every time) when the game tries to actually start it crashes with "Unable to locate Uplay PC" popup.
title: Might & Magic® Heroes® VII

notes: The problem with UPlay can be solved with ""protontricks 321960 uplay". UPlay starts then, tries to start the game, but nothing opens except UPlay icon in Wine tray. Process with the game runs at 100% CPU but shows nothing.
title: Might & Magic® Heroes® VII
